        print()
" 2>/dev/null | head -100

arguments.command:
curl -s --max-time 10 "https://www.theverge.com/rss/index.xml" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
content = sys.stdin.read()
# Extract titles and summaries from RSS
titles = re.findall(r'<title><!\[CDATA\[(.*?)\]\]></title>', content)
links = re.findall(r'<link>(https?://[^<]+)</link>', content)
descs = re.findall(r'<description><!\[CDATA\[(.*?)\]\]></description>', content, re.DOTALL)
for i in range(min(10, len(titles))):
    print(f'{i+1}. {titles[i]}')
    if i < len(descs):
        desc = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', descs[i])
        print(f'   {desc[:200]}')
    print()
" 2>/dev/null

arguments.command:
curl -s --max-time 10 -L "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/technology/rss.xml" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
content = sys.stdin.read()
titles = re.findall(r'<title>([^<]+)</title>', content)
descs = re.findall(r'<description>([^<]+)</description>', content)
links = re.findall(r'<link>(https?://[^<]+)</link>', content)
for i in range(min(10, len(titles))):
    t = titles[i] if i < len(titles) else ''
    d = descs[i+1] if i+1 < len(descs) else ''  # skip first which is channel title
    l = links[i+1] if i+1 < len(links) else ''   # skip first which is feed link
    if t and 'xml' not in t.lower():
        print(f'{i+1}. {t}')
        if d:
            print(f'   {d[:200]}')
        if l:
            print(f'   {l}')
        print()
" 2>/dev/null
